subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-04 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Every power and ability that is utilized for the Cause of God shall produce perpetually enduring effects and yield eternally abiding results… As to those souls endowed with the power of oratory
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر قوه و استعدادی که در امر الله صرف میشود اثراتش باقی میماند و نتائج باقیه
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
